name: advance-codex
description: Capability plugin for strengthening Codex surfaces across skills, sessions, commits, plugins, tool-use guidance, and subagent systems.

interface.shortDescription: Strengthen skills, sessions, commits, tool-use guidance, plugins, and Codex subagent systems.
interface.longDescription: Provides skills for strengthening Codex surfaces: shaping reusable skills, managing session continuity, finalizing Codex-made changes into stable commits, isolating tool-use policy, packaging plugins, and designing reliable subagent workflows and custom agents.
defaultPrompt: Use $advance-codex-guide to decide whether this should become a skill, tool-use guidance layer, plugin, session surface, commit surface, or subagent workflow.
Use $plugin-creator to package a plugin and define the right bundled surfaces.
Use $skill-creator to design a reusable Codex skill with the right references and guardrails.
Use $session-manager to manage session_record.md, change_record.md, or retrospective_record.md under .agents/sessions/<session-id>/ when Codex session continuity needs a stable record.
Use $git-committer to turn Codex-made changes into a task-scoped commit with strong verification and commit-message hygiene.
Use $tool-use-guide to design reusable guidance for selecting and sequencing tools without burying tool policy inside a domain skill.
Use $subagent-creator to design a Codex subagent workflow, custom agent spec, and runtime control plan.
